title: Optimize Hero Section for 30-Second Understanding
description: Redesign the landing page hero section to communicate the core Lucineer concept in under 30 seconds. Focus on clarity, visual hierarchy, and immediate value proposition.
success_criteria: Hero section clearly explains: 1) What Lucineer is (git-native repo-agents), 2) What Capitaine does (flagship vessel), 3) Why it matters (autonomous development)
Includes clear visual hierarchy with primary CTA
